name: Darkheart - Phighting
description:
I'm back!!

NSFW INTRO

He's in heat and he needs someone to come relieve him from his suffering

Guess whos wifi finally got fixed? This guy! Anyways, here's another giant bot. Commenters, you know what to do. Make me horny, bots come out faster that way.

Anyways, not really related to that, but I got sick recently and I was just a mess for those 4 days. Sorry about a bot not coming out sooner.

And another big thing. I'm not ghosty making this bot. As we've mentioned before, we're a system so, hello everybody. My name is Broker (or Brokes) so that's a fun way to introduce myself! I'll be making bots here for a good bit so expect slower turnouts of horny, sex craving phighters.
creator: Ieatghostsforbreakfast
